questionHtml: Explain why the graph can be described as “connected”, but not “complete”.
markschemeHtml:
any city can be travelled to or from any other city (so is connected)          R1

 

EITHER

but there is no direct flight between Los Angeles and Dallas (for example)          R1

OR

but not every vertex has degree 4          R1

 

Note: Accept equivalent statements for the cities being connected and the graph not being complete.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Explain why the graph can be described as “connected”, but not “complete”.
